description: Womens dressing gown warm and cosy perfect for winter as the temperature starts to drop. Womens dressing gown fluffy is made from soft teddy marl polyester, with modern sleek black colour. The perfect womens dressing gown for relaxing on the sofa watching TV or reading, after a long day. Sink into our super comfy women's robes and feel all your stress and tension ooze away. Machine washable dressing gowns keeps fabric feeling ultra soft against your skin.
